acceptance_criteria:
1. JinjaPromptValue struct wrapping PromptValue
2. as_jinja_value() conversion on PromptValue
3. Debug impl showing type and path
4. Display impl delegating to render_prompt_value
5. Object trait impl stubs
6. cargo check passes

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content: Display impl should be a stub/placeholder until dsrs-n9u.24 installs the custom formatter that routes through render_prompt_value. The code sample shows the final form, not the initial stub.

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content: Display impl should be a stub initially (just write '<PromptValue>') - the code sample in description shows the FINAL form after dsrs-n9u.24 wires the custom formatter. Don't try to call render_prompt_value until .24 is done.

title: Implement JinjaPromptValue object wrapper

acceptance_criteria:
1. derive(Signature) compiles
2. Parses struct name, fields, doc comments
3. Extracts #[input]/#[output] annotations
4. Extracts #[check]/#[assert] with expressions and labels
5. Extracts #[alias] values
6. Produces compile error for invalid inputs
title: Set up derive(Signature) macro scaffolding and parsing
